title: cyanea quercifolia
intro: Cyanea quercifolia is a rare and endangered plant species native to Hawaii, belonging to the Bignonaceae family and is also known as the "Hawaiian lobelia". It has been traditionally used in Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, such as arthritis, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its health benefits, including pain relief and wound healing. Cyanea quercifolia can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional Hawaiian medicine.
